changelog: send_code_to_revit now works on Revit 2025+: Roslyn compilation runs in an isolated AssemblyLoadContext that binds its own System.Collections.Immutable/Reflection.Metadata 8.0, fixing the 'Could not load Microsoft.CodeAnalysis 4.12.0.0' failure caused by other add-ins loading older copies into Revit's shared load context. Includes the v1.0.47 send_code de-prioritization, critical-confirmation gate, and Settings toggle.
